title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.10.12 - Invert unified: 'Invert X' now always means 'Invert X of each invertible debuff into buffs' - no more last-modified / random / next-modified variants, cards simplified to just 'Invert X.'. New card Living the Dream (pure Invert). Swing removed. Enjoy the Ride now inverts at end of turn; Bright Side inverts each. Most Invert amounts reduced. Requires BaseLib.
